configure_session_description: Configure and start a new voting session for this challenge
choose_evaluation_method: Choose how jury members will evaluate ideas

voting_method_descriptions.ranking: Jury members rank all ideas from best to worst. Points are calculated using the Borda count method - lower ranks get higher points. The idea with the most total points wins.
voting_method_descriptions.scoring: Jury members assign a score from 0 to 100 to each idea. Ideas are ranked by their average score across all jury members. Higher scores indicate stronger ideas.
voting_method_descriptions.approval: Jury members simply approve or reject each idea. Ideas are ranked by approval count - the number of jury members who approved them. Simple and quick voting method.

instructions_hint: Special instructions or criteria for voting
no_eligible_ideas_description: There are no approved or submitted ideas available for voting. Ideas must be approved before starting a voting session.
no_active_jury_members_description: There are no active jury members assigned to this challenge. Please assign jury members before starting a voting session.
active_session_description: Currently running voting session for this challenge
all_voting_sessions: All voting sessions for this challenge
no_sessions_yet_description: Start your first jury voting session to get started
close_voting_session_description: Are you sure you want to close this voting session? This action cannot be undone and voting results will be finalized.
waiting_for_votes: Waiting for jury members to submit their votes
